name: Magnificent Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Melt chocolate and set aside to cool.
3. Combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large mixing bowl.
4. Add shortening, cooled chocolate, and 1 1/2 cups milk. Blend on low speed.
5. Beat for 2 minutes at medium speed, scraping sides of the bowl frequently.
6. Blend in beaten eggs, remaining milk, and vanilla. Continue beating for 2 minutes.
7. Stir in chopped nuts.
8. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan and spread evenly.
9. Tap the pan lightly on a table or countertop to release any large air bubbles.
10. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Cool cake in the pan on a rack for 20 minutes.
12. Remove from the pan and let cool completely on a rack.
13. Sprinkle with confectioners' sugar.
